news.title: See the New Trailer for Pokémon Winds and Pokémon Waves, Coming to Nintendo Switch 2
news.summary: Get the first details about the upcoming games, including a look at the main characters and the new first partner Pokémon.

pokemon.name: Browt
pokemon.description: This Pokémon runs about energetically while photosynthesising using the leaves on its brow. It’s lively, but it can also be a bit clumsy.

pokemon.name: Pombon
pokemon.description: The area below its throat glows faintly from the heat-generating organ within its lungs. This Pokémon is guileless and friendly.

pokemon.name: Gecqua
pokemon.description: This Pokémon launches springy balls of water from its tail. Gecqua is very intelligent and maneuvers shrewdly while putting on airs​.
